title: SEO Engine Restricted Effectiveness Mode — Phase 21.1
trigger: Phase 21 audit grade: D. Engine active but not yet effective. 0 clicks from 7 days of actions.
allowed_daily_actions: Improve top indexing targets (real pages only, verified by URL Inspection)
Improve real pages only (calculators, decisions, guides, blogs — NOT tools/scenarios)
Add internal links to parent calculators, guides, and decisions
Audit thin tools/scenarios (audit ONLY — no SEO improvements)
Request indexing via GSC UI for changed important pages (max 10/day)
blocked_daily_actions: Optimizing thin tool/scenario variants as SEO targets
Title-only mass fixes without page intent improvement
Changing pages without documented KPI hypothesis
Using stale/cached GSC data for decisions
Creating new pages unless score >= 90 and Auditor approves
resume_full_engine_condition: Engine audit grade improves from D to at least C within 14 days. At least one positive signal detected (click, indexed important page, improved rankings on real pages).
